summary: A Go-based monolithic project utilizing an AI agent orchestration system (GOrchestra) to generate extensive test suites for a runner, schema validator, and MCP handlers.
concerns: High volume of auto-generated 'extra tests' from GOrchestra agents may bloat the codebase
Deeply nested agent-generated directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents/*) complicate repository navigation
Potential redundancy between baseline tests and agent-generated extra tests
suggestions: Consolidate or archive GOrchestra agent session artifacts outside the main source tree
Evaluate if agent-generated extra tests provide unique coverage versus the baseline tests
Establish a cleanup policy for merged agent branches to maintain a clean repository structure
